title: ArchStudio diagram spec
description: Agent-friendly architecture diagram spec for ArchStudio (https://archstudio.mjolnix.com.br). Omit node x/y and the built-in auto-layout arranges the flow left-to-right following the edges. Load via the app's 📂 button, via URL '#d=j:<base64url(JSON)>' or '?src=<url>'.

name.description: Diagram title shown in the top bar and in exports.

boxes.description: Dashed group containers (e.g. 'AWS us-east-1', 'On-premise'). Nodes reference them via their 'box' property; the box is sized automatically around its members.

lock.description: Pin the item: it is not moved, copied, deleted or picked by the lasso — and the AI will not remove it.

rot.description: Rotation in degrees. The editor snaps to 15° steps while the grid magnet is on.

color.description: Optional hex color; a palette color is picked when omitted.

type.description: Component type. Unknown values fall back to 'api'.

label.description: Display name; defaults to the type's catalog name.

box.description: Id of the box this node belongs to.

color.description: Optional accent color override (border/icon); defaults to the category color.

lock.description: Pin the item: it is not moved, copied, deleted or picked by the lasso — and the AI will not remove it.

rot.description: Rotation in degrees. The editor snaps to 15° steps while the grid magnet is on.

tech.description: C4-style technology, rendered as [Spring Boot] under the name. Works on ANY type, not just c4* ones.

desc.description: C4-style one-line description under the name/technology. Works on ANY type.

multiple.description: Draw the card as a stack, meaning several instances (replicas, pods, workers).

edges.description: Directed connections between nodes. In IaC generation these define wiring and least-privilege IAM.

route.description: Line routing: straight (default), rounded curve, or right angles. Optional.

pts.description: Control points the user dragged on the canvas. Optional — leave it out and let the editor place the line.

lock.description: Pin the item: it is not moved, copied, deleted or picked by the lasso — and the AI will not remove it.

color.description: Optional line/arrowhead color; defaults to the theme edge color.

texts.description: Free-floating annotations — use them for key architectural decisions and constraints.

color.description: Optional hex text color; defaults to the theme ink color.

frame.description: Render as a text box: a rounded rectangle with background and border that wraps text to 'w'.

w.description: Text box width in px (only when frame is true). Text wraps to this width.

bg.description: Text box background/border tint (only when frame is true); defaults to the theme card color.

lock.description: Pin the item: it is not moved, copied, deleted or picked by the lasso — and the AI will not remove it.

rot.description: Rotation in degrees. The editor snaps to 15° steps while the grid magnet is on.
